description: Single-day time grid view with configurable slot duration, resource grouping, drag-and-drop, and resize support. Delegates rendering to TmSchedulerTimeGrid.

parameters.name: SlotDuration
parameters.description: Duration of each time slot in minutes.

parameters.name: OnSlotClick
parameters.description: Fires when a time slot is clicked.

parameters.name: OnEventClick
parameters.description: Fires when an event is clicked.

parameters.name: OnEventChanged
parameters.description: Fires when an event is moved or resized.

parameters.name: OnSlotContextMenu
parameters.description: Fires when right-clicking on a time slot.

parameters.name: OnEventContextMenu
parameters.description: Fires when right-clicking on an event.

examples.title: Day view with resource columns
examples.code: <TmSchedulerDayView CurrentDate="DateTime.Today" Events="@_events" Resources="@_rooms" SlotDuration="30" OnSlotClick="@HandleSlotClick" OnEventClick="@HandleEventClick" />
